arts.ttl: Report: Nottingham Forest learn what it will take to sign Douglas Luiz this month
‘Difficult to obtain’ – Acceptance Nottingham Forest or Fulham won’t be paying €45m for transfer
arts.sum: Two days ago, Tuttosport reported Nottingham Forest and Fulham are in the picture to sign Juventus’ Douglas Luiz and the Reds have already made contact. It was also said Nottingham Forest and Marco Silva’s side have the funds to meet the Old Lady’s request in the winter market. arts.ttl: Ambitious claim Nottingham Forest player keen on move to specific club – Feels weighted with bias
arts.sum: There’s a claim in the Turkish media that Galatasaray are showing interest in Nottingham Forest defender Ola Aina. The Super Lig side wanted to sign an experienced right back during the last window following the departure of Serge Aurier, but could only bring in Danish youngster Elias Jelert.
